findings.29_eeg_ratios_compatible: KS p=0.053 — CANNOT DISTINGUISH from SCPN (borderline)
findings.30_cfc_not_match: r=0.306, p=0.55 — cross-frequency coupling does NOT match SCPN exponential decay
findings.31_eeg_log_spacing: EEG CV=0.396 (relatively uniform), SCPN CV=0.936 (highly non-uniform)
findings.32_K_c_ratio: EEG K_c=6.35, SCPN K_c=2.7 — EEG needs 2.35x stronger coupling
findings.33_buzsaki_rule: EEG mean ratio 2.465 (~9% off from e=2.718)

interpretation: Frequency architectures compatible but different uniformity. EEG has near-uniform log spacing (Buzsaki), SCPN has exponential compression. Brain coupling topology differs from SCPN exponential decay.
